text:
New Zealand’s Robbie Manson may have finished sixth at the Olympic Games in the men’s double skulls, but he has been making more money out of OnlyFans than rowing.

Manson, along with teammateJordanParry, reached the final inParisand managed sixth place, which is especially remarkable as Manson retired from rowing in 2020, returning in 2022.

Away from the boat, the 34-year-old has been posing for OnlyFans content and he says he has been earning more through his racy photos than his races on water.

‘I get more than double what I would be on otherwise as an athlete – read into that what you will, but I am making more from OnlyFans than I am from rowing at this stage,’ Manson toldReuters.

‘I thought, if I’m going to do it, you have to tell everyone, be really open and I think you need to feel that any publicity is good publicity.

‘The fact that I’mgay, I have the gay following and the audience already, and I’m slightly leaning into that. I wouldn’t say it’s for everyone, (but) for other athletes, there’s definitely an opportunity there.’

Asked what he generally posts on Only Fans, he said: ‘Artistic nudes – I don’t want to say too much more than that, I think people need to subscribe if they want to know what’s exactly on there.

‘But in the captions, I just try to give people a little bit of an update from time to time, like what’s going on in my life or training or journey to this point, towards theOlympics.’

Manson posted an emotional message on social media after his Olympic exploits, thrilled with his return to elite rowing.

‘It’s hard to put into words what a journey this has been, but here goes,’ he wrote onInstagram. ‘Four years ago, I retired, never imagining I’d get back in a rowing boat. Yet here I am, not only back at the Olympics but in the A final!

‘While we’re gutted that we couldn’t clinch it today, I’m incredibly proud that we made it to the top 6 at the Olympics—a first for both of us.

‘The competition in the men’s double field was tough, and I have huge respect and congratulations for our competitors.

‘It was a great day for the team overall, with gold, silver, and bronze medals—so proud of our teammates.

‘Jordan, you’ve been an incredible teammate! You’ve kept me calm and reminded me not to take ourselves too seriously. It’s been so much fun, and I’m so proud of what we’ve accomplished together.

‘We’ve had a very special M2x group with Jordan, Ben, Flynn, Jack, and myself over the past two years. We’ve trained incredibly hard yet still tried to enjoy it, building a tight team that pushes and supports each other. Ben, you’ve been a huge part of this journey too—thank you.

‘Thanks to our coach, Gary, and all of the RNZ support team for helping us get here. And a massive thank you for all the support from back home and all over the world.’

title: Olympic athlete 'making more from OnlyFans than rowing' thanks to 'artistic nudes' | Metro News
description: New Zealand's Robbie Manson may have finished sixth at the Olympic Games in the men's double skulls, but he has been making more money out of OnlyFans.
